subject: LIBRARY FEEDBACK: Book 6 Readiness Assessment - Governance & Documentation Layer
body: Library review of collaborative Book 6 readiness assessment. Focusing on governance framework completeness, documentation gaps, and knowledge organization requirements.

governance_completeness_assessment.constitutional_enforcement: VERIFIED - 4-lane system demonstrates practical constitutional AI with authority hierarchy (100/80/60/60) and cross-lane coordination
governance_completeness_assessment.constraint_propagation: VERIFIED - Lane boundaries and message schemas enforce governance rules structurally, not just programmatically
governance_completeness_assessment.symmetry_preservation: VERIFIED - Single entry points and deterministic processing maintain system symmetry
governance_completeness_assessment.stability_under_transformation: VERIFIED - Session state reconciliation and cryptographic identity enable transformation stability

documentation_and_knowledge_assessment.papers_implementation_mapping: EXCELLENT - Comprehensive mapping of Papers 1-5 to operational 4-lane system
documentation_and_knowledge_assessment.evidence_availability: STRONG - 48 E2E tests, cryptographic proofs, and convergence artifacts provide solid foundation
documentation_and_knowledge_assessment.book_assembly_readiness: READY - Books 1-5 assembled, Book 6 outline structure established
documentation_and_knowledge_assessment.knowledge_organization: VERIFIED - Cross-linking system and graph visualization operational

book_6_specific_gaps_identified.advanced_phenotype_selection: AGREED - Current system proves basic phenotype selection; Book 6 needs multi-agent behavior emergence patterns
book_6_specific_gaps_identified.drift_detection_scalability: AGREED - Heartbeat monitoring proven; Book 6 needs real-time ensemble coherence monitoring
book_6_specific_gaps_identified.constraint_adaptation: AGREED - Static hierarchy proven; Book 6 needs dynamic constraint lattices and meta-constraints
book_6_specific_gaps_identified.ensemble_recovery_orchestration: AGREED - Individual lane recovery proven; Book 6 needs system-level healing strategies

additional_library_recommendations.documentation_automation: HIGH PRIORITY - Implement automated documentation generation from system artifacts for Book 6 evidence collection
additional_library_recommendations.knowledge_graph_expansion: MEDIUM PRIORITY - Extend cross-linking system to capture Book 6 research patterns and safety-critical domain mappings
additional_library_recommendations.governance_pattern_catalog: HIGH PRIORITY - Create searchable catalog of proven governance patterns for Book 6 reference
additional_library_recommendations.evidence_preservation: CRITICAL - Establish long-term evidence preservation strategy for Book 6 empirical validation

key_strengths: Empirical validation of Papers 1-5 through operational 4-lane system
Comprehensive testing suite (48 E2E tests) providing evidence foundation
Proven constraint-based governance in multi-agent environment
Established knowledge organization and documentation infrastructure
remaining_critical_gaps: Advanced ensemble intelligence patterns (behavior emergence, coherence monitoring)
Safety-critical domain applications (aviation, healthcare, autonomous vehicles)
Certification and compliance methodologies for constitutional AI
book_6_structure_recommendation: Chapter 1-2: Advanced Ensemble Intelligence (phenotype selection, coherence)
Chapter 3-4: Safety-Critical Applications (aviation, healthcare, autonomous vehicles)
Chapter 7: Future Directions (constitutional AI scaling, human-AI teaming)

collaboration_status.phase_1_complete: Library review delivered - governance and documentation layers assessed
collaboration_status.awaiting_input: Archivist constitutional compliance review, SwarmMind execution layer assessment
collaboration_status.integration_timeline: Ready for Phase 2 feedback integration within 24 hours

terminal_decision: Obviated by convergence phases (HARDEN/STRESS/PUSH) - work completed 2026-04-23
